title: Application of Turbulent Diffusion Term of Aerosols in Mesoscale Model
justification: the new empirical stability function (i.e., Equation 4e) was derived based on a database of large eddy simulation (LES) for neutral and stable conditions compiled by Esau and Byrkjedal ( 2007).

title: Do Subsampling Strategies Reduce the Confounding Effect of Errors in Bispectral Retrievals on Estimates of Aerosol Cloud Interactions?
justification: We use an ensemble of stochastically‐modeled cloud fields and 3D radiative transfer simulations to study the retrieval errors at a solar zenith angle of 30°.
